judging_criteria.name: ZK Load-Bearing
judging_criteria.desc: ZK powers a real part of how the project works; remove the proof and the product breaks. Not namechecked in README.

judging_criteria.name: Stellar Integration Depth
judging_criteria.desc: Proofs verified in a Soroban contract or otherwise integrating Stellar testnet/mainnet, using native BN254/Poseidon/BLS12-381 host functions.

judging_criteria.name: Real-World Utility
judging_criteria.desc: Solves a real problem; organizer-favored toward real money (payments, RWA, settlement, compliance) but any genuine utility counts.

judging_criteria.name: Execution & Demo
judging_criteria.desc: Working, honest, well-documented; clear 2-3 min demo that visibly shows ZK doing real work. Sharp Mild beats sprawling.

judges: Stellar Development Foundation team (specific judges not published)

builder_profile.note: Builder uses Claude Code (high dev speed). Rust experience transfers to Soroban. Constraint is circuit/ZK-toolchain novelty, mitigated by fork-ready verifier repos and Stellar Dev Skill.

core_tech: Stellar / Soroban smart contracts (Rust) + zero-knowledge (Noir / Circom / RISC Zero off-chain proofs, on-chain verification via Protocol 25 BN254+Poseidon / Protocol 26 BN254 host functions / BLS12-381)

constraints.video: 2-3 min demo, need not appear on camera
constraints.submission: open-source repo (GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket) + README + demo video; ZK load-bearing; must touch Stellar
